uplink.description: periodic data: temperature, humidity, pressure, CO2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds periodic frame (product 0xB5, msg 0x01). TLV channels 0x07/0x08/0x09/0x0A. Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temp 515/10-30=21.5 C, hum 480/10=48 %RH, pressure 1013 hPa, co2 700 ppm), then mapped to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: periodic data: temperature + humidity + PM1/PM2.5/PM10 mass
uplink._note: Synthetic periodic frame exercising PM mass channels 0x01/0x02/0x03 (ug/m3, no vocabulary key -> camelCase extras) alongside temp/humidity. Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: periodic data: temperature sensor error sentinel suppressed, humidity retained
uplink._note: Temperature channel 0x07 carries the 0xFFFF error sentinel (upstream returns "Error"); we suppress it and keep humidity. Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: product status: battery voltage (mV) normalized to volts
uplink._note: Product status frame (msg 0x02): batteryVoltage 0x0E10 = 3600 mV -> battery 3.6 V (mV/1000 per the unit table). Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (swRevision 20*0.1=2.0, power source bit 0 = external).

uplink.description: positionning frame: GPS fix -> decimal latitude/longitude
uplink._note: Synthetic positionning frame (msg 0x03). Upstream DMS extraction yields lat 48 deg 36 min 26 s 400 ms North, lon 4 deg 2 min 0 s 0 ms East, 2 satellites. Converted to decimal degrees (deg + min/60 + sec/3600 + ms/1000/3600) -> 48.607333 / 4.033333. Expected components verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: product configuration frame carries no measurement

errors: product configuration frame carries no normalized measurement

uplink._note: Msg 0x04 is device settings, not telemetry; we report an error rather than fabricate a measurement object.
Product byte 0xAB (Nexelec MOVE) is not 0xB5 (TRACK+); the codec rejects it. Synthetic negative test.
